title: MARSYS-JIS Resonance Register Entry Schema v0.1
description: Schema for resonance register entries in 035_DISCOVERY_LAYER/REGISTERS/RESONANCE_REGISTER_v1_0.json. Produced at Madhav_M2A_Exec_10 (2026-04-27) per PHASE_B_PLAN_v1_0.md §B.5 Resonance walk.

claim_text.description: Plain-English statement of the cross-domain resonance (≤300 chars recommended).

mechanism.description: How the shared signal mechanism operates simultaneously in both bridged domains — at least one sentence.

domains_bridged.description: Exactly two domains this resonance bridges. Must be from the canonical domain enum.

signals_referenced.description: MSR signal IDs (SIG.MSR.NNN) this resonance draws on. Must resolve to actual MSR_v3_0 signals.

cdlm_cells_referenced.description: CDLM cell IDs this resonance extends or complements (e.g. CDLM.career.children). Must resolve to actual CDLM_v1_1 cells.

counter_cases.description: Known counter-examples or conditions under which the resonance does not hold.

classical_basis.description: Citation to classical text (e.g. 'BPHS Ch.23 Sl.7') or 'derivative — emergent resonance'.

alternatives.description: Alternative interpretations of the cross-domain bridge. ≥2 required when significance ≥0.7 per P7.

validator_results.description: Per-validator pass/fail results from Claude Pass-2.

confidence.description: Confidence level assigned by Gemini Pass-1 and validated in Pass-2.

significance.description: Significance score (0–1). Gates P7 three-interpretation check at threshold 0.7.

is_forward_looking.description: True if resonance makes a testable time-indexed claim. Triggers Hook 2 prediction logging.

time_indexed_falsifier.description: Required when is_forward_looking is true. Specifies falsifiable prediction window.

ledger_event_ids.description: Two-pass trail: [resonance_proposal event_id, claude_resonance_accept event_id]. Both required.

pass_1_actor.description: Actor that produced Pass-1 (proposal). Per PHASE_B_PLAN §E.5: resonance Pass-1 MUST be 'gemini'. Required for all Resonance entries (no Exec_9-style exemption — Resonance is new in Exec_10).

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of resonance acceptance.

created_by_session.description: Session ID that accepted this resonance (e.g. Madhav_M2A_Exec_10).
